# Pull Request

## Summary

One sentence: what does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation only

## For new skills, confirm ALL of the following:

- [ ] I used `SKILL_TEMPLATE.md` as the starting point
- [ ] The skill follows the Claude Skill format (valid front-matter with `name` + `description`, kebab-case folder, structured Markdown body)
- [ ] The skill is in the right category folder under `skills/`
- [ ] **I updated the "Available Skills" section in the root `README.md`** ⚠️ (mandatory; PR will be rejected without this)
- [ ] My skill is portable (no Claude-specific features) **OR** I included a Compatibility section explaining what it needs
- [ ] I tested it on at least 2 real tasks
- [ ] The `description` field has clear trigger phrases (mandatory + strong + when NOT to fire)

## Testing

Which AI assistant(s) did you test this on? (e.g. Claude Sonnet 4.6, ChatGPT GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, etc.)

What real tasks did you test it on? What worked? What didn't?

## Anything you want a reviewer to push back on?

Be honest. The whole point is to catch weak spots before they get merged.
